mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, (SELECT MIN(store_id) FROM store_tbl WHERE member_id = m.member_id) AS storeId FROM MEMBER_TBL m WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND m.MEMBER_GRADE = #{memberGrade}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TBL ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_THUMB, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_ADDRCODE, MEMBER_ADDR, MEMBER_DETAIL_ADDR, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, MEMBER_GRADE, MEMBER_POINT, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, NULL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberAddrcode}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberDetailAddr}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 1, default, SYSDATE, 1 )

INSERT INTO MEMBER_TBL ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_GRADE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberGrade} )
mapper.update: update member_tbl set member_status = 2 WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_point, total_carbon_reduce FROM member_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_TBL SET MEMBER_ADDRCODE = #{memberAddrcode}, MEMBER_ADDR = #{memberAddr}, MEMBER_DETAIL_ADDR = #{memberDetailAddr}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from order_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and order_status not in (0, 5, 9)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tbl WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_tbl (order_id, member_id, review_thumb, review_content, review_rating, review_date, store_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{reviewThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewRating}, SYSDATE, #{storeId})
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tbl SET review_status = 1 WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.order_id AS orderId, o.review_status AS reviewStatus, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.review_rating AS reviewRating, r.review_thumb AS reviewThumb, rc.review_comment_content AS reviewCommentContent, TO_CHAR(rc.review_comment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewCommentDate, TO_CHAR(r.review_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewDate, r.member_id AS memberId, m.member_thumb AS memberProfile, s.store_name AS storeName,
( SELECT SUM(price * quantity) FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id ) AS totalPrice,
CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 3000 END AS deliveryPrice,
( SELECT m2.menu_name FROM order_detail od JOIN menu_tbl m2 ON od.menu_id = m2.menu_id WHERE od.order_id = r.order_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS menuName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id ) AS extraCount
FROM review_tbl r JOIN order_tbl o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN store_tbl s ON r.store_id = s.store_id JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN review_comment_tbl rc ON r.order_id = rc.order_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.review_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, s.store_name AS storeName, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDate, o.get_point AS getPoint, o.point_reward AS pointReward, o.order_status, o.used_point AS usedPoint FROM order_tbl o JOIN order_list_map m ON o.order_id = m.order_id JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.order_status > 0 AND m.reg_date >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3) AND (o.get_point > 0 OR o.used_point > 0) ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC
SELECT member_point FROM member_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EASTER_EGG WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND EGG_NAME = #{eggName}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_tbl SET member_point = member_point + #{reward} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EASTER_EGG (EGG_ID, MEMBER_ID, EGG_NAME, REWARD_POINTS) VALUES (SEQ_EASTER_EGG.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{eggName}, #{reward})
